creator: gallasch@free.de
text:
port build of net/asterisk-agx fails on i386, FreeBSD 6.3


port makefile head:
-------------------

# New ports collection makefile for:   asterisk-agx
# Date created:        27 November 2007
# Whom:                Pavel Titov
#
# $FreeBSD$
#

PORTNAME=      asterisk-agx
PORTVERSION=   1.4.2
CATEGORIES=    net
MASTER_SITES=  ${MASTER_SITE_SOURCEFORGE}
MASTER_SITE_SUBDIR=agx-ast-addons
DISTNAME=      agx-ast-addons-${PORTVERSION}



system:
-------

6.3-STABLE FreeBSD 6.3-STABLE #0: Wed Mar 19 21:15:38 CET 2008
architecture: i386


installed port dependencies:
----------------------------

- asterisk-1.4.18.1
- tiff-3.8.2_1
- spandsp-devel-0.0.4.p15
- cmake-2.4.8
